'''thashate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bobbishly|bobbishly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-sh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bobbishly|bobbishly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thashate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thashate|thashate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thashatesher|thashatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thashatesherĂ«m|thashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thashatero|thashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thashateshĂ«|thashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thashateshĂ«m|thashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithashatero|gokithashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithashateshĂ«|gokithashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithashateshĂ«m|gokithashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothashankerom|gothashankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothashankeshĂ«|gothashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothashankeshĂ«m|gothashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothashankeya|gothashankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thashaterom|thashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thashatemu|thashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thashateya|thashateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithashaterom|gokithashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithashatemu|gokithashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithashateya|gokithashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thashashate|thashashate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thashashatesher|thashashatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thashashatesherĂ«m|thashashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thashashatero|thashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thashashateshĂ«|thashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thashashateshĂ«m|thashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithashashatero|gokithashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithashashateshĂ«|gokithashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithashashateshĂ«m|gokithashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothashashankerom|gothashashankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothashashankeshĂ«|gothashashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothashashankeshĂ«m|gothashashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothashashankeya|gothashashankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thashashaterom|thashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thashashatemu|thashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thashashateya|thashashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithashashaterom|gokithashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithashashatemu|gokithashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithashashateya|gokithashashateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠshĂŠte|thĂŠshĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠshĂŠtesher|thĂŠshĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠshĂŠtero|thĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠshĂŠtero|gokithĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠshĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠshĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothĂŠshĂŠnkeya|gothĂŠshĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠshĂŠterom|thĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠshĂŠtemu|thĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠshĂŠteya|thĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠshĂŠterom|gokithĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠshĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠshĂŠteya|gokithĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thafshafte|thafshafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafshaftesher|thafshaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafshaftesherĂ«m|thafshaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafshaftero|thafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafshafteshĂ«|thafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafshafteshĂ«m|thafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafshaftero|gokithafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafshafteshĂ«|gokithafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafshafteshĂ«m|gokithafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafshafnkerom|gothafshafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafshafnkeshĂ«|gothafshafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafshafnkeshĂ«m|gothafshafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafshafnkeya|gothafshafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafshafterom|thafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafshaftemu|thafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafshafteya|thafshafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafshafterom|gokithafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafshaftemu|gokithafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafshafteya|gokithafshafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
